name: atheon
description: Export LLM, Tools and SubAgent analytics to Atheon using atheon-codex

apiKey.label: Atheon Project API Key
apiKey.help: Required. Used to authenticate with Atheon. Defaults to ATHEON_API_KEY if not provided.

uploadSize.label: Batch Size (events)
uploadSize.help: Events per HTTP batch. Defaults to '10'.

uploadInterval.label: Upload Interval
uploadInterval.help: Seconds between background flushes. Defaults to '1.0'.

reaperIntervalMs.label: Cleanup Interval (ms)
reaperIntervalMs.help: How often system scans for idle or completed events to clean up. Defaults to '300000' (5 min).

maxEventIdleTimeMs.label: Max Event Idle Time (ms)
maxEventIdleTimeMs.help: Inactivity window before idle events being automatically flushed. Defaults to '3600000' (1 hour).
